item.title: Before and Now, 19th June
item.description:
- 2 bags full of litter/flytip in front of Bromley College. - A one off blitz clean was done by a Street Friend, but surely, more can by done by the educational establishment to educate our future generations and futur leaders about respecting and valuing our environment. Please feel free to share the attached photos with Bromley College (consent given). In conjunction with the above, could LBB put up a relevant sign or warning to stop the ongoing loitering, please. Thank you in advance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A21, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Granville Road, NW6 5AR, 19th June
item.description:
It’s the Bottom end of Granville Road. Squatters have been REMOVED FINALLY and they have Left the Area TRASHED and NOTHING but RUBBISH, it NEEDS REMOVING and The Area SANITISED. Parents with Children have to walk past it, Elderly Residents and for ALL The Residents , Visitors and Passerby’s The Area has to be CLEANED ASAP. It’s BOT NICE for the Residents of Granville Road to Now have to See ALL This RUBBISH Left.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load
